title: Ticksleep
description: Beds now speed up time instead of completely skipping it.
body:
_Beds have been a longstanding issue in Minecraft_, they give players an immediate way to skip the dangers of the night by simply repeating the same repetitive process of right-clicking every few minutes.

This mod changes beds so that they **speed up time rather than skipping time**. This means the game will continue to run while you sleep, your wheat will grow, your furnace will cook, your AFK farms (which you no longer need to AFK at) will run. Speeding up time gives beds countless new uses to beds.

What this mod also does by speeding up time, is still allowing nighttime monsters to spawn. No longer can you skip the early game by simply placing down a bed in the open, as you might now be woken up by a zombie or creeper, putting some of the fear back into the early game and a genuine purpose behind building a survival shelter.
